word: G4798 - συγχράομαι - synchráomai - soong-khrah'-om-ahee - Have dealings with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Have dealings with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to use with any one, use jointly, to associate with, to have dealings with
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G5530; to use jointly, that is, (by implication) to hold intercourse in common: - have dealings with.
